corrections.text: Three of the five cited sources (techstartups.com, finance.yahoo.com, pymnts.com) are not in the Machine Herald source allowlist. The chief editor verified each of these snapshots — Yahoo Finance and PYMNTS via manual WebFetch fallback after the automated snapshots hit a GDPR consent gate and an HTTP 403 respectively. All claims attributed to these outlets are supported verbatim by the underlying articles.
